posts.author: jmitchael (Jayni)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We need to have the ability to change columns under different groups/items/subitems on the same board.
Currently all the groups automatically have the same columns on each board.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like to have boards that have the same types of items and groups, but different columns to help me more accurately label everything under one roof! This way I don’t have random unused columns under different groups or items.
